/Users/bozoegg/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.0.12674087/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-linux-android26 --sysroot=/Users/bozoegg/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.0.12674087/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security   -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments   -Wl,--gc-sections  -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/AudioSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Bullet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Powerup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/StageDirector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Effects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/SpriteManager.cpp.o -o sky_circuit  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -ldl -llog -landroid -lEGL -lGLESv2 -lOpenSLES -latomic -lc -latomic -lm
